sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116081" key="w)/i+sxa" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὤϊσχα·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπήνεμα,</foreign> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠηρίχθαι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπήνεμοι, ὥριμοι,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
